Who We Are

GET TO KNOW US

Get in Touch

Got questions? We provide 10 minute free consultations to answer all your inquiries.
LET'S TALK
WHAT WE DO
Full-Service Digital Marketing and Web-design Company in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia
At Alpha, we guide companies to discover and take full advantage of online digital markets. In short, we help your customers find you, trust you and buy from you.
  • Innovative Web-Design

    We design top-of-the-line websites with enterprise SEO that will combine the latest design concepts and your vision.

  • Digital Marketing

    We take a data-driven and results-oriented approach to digital marketing. Our goal is to help you achieve digital superiority.

OUR SERVICES
What We Offer
We serve local and international clients with unparalleled digital marketing solutions.

Web Design

Get your online storefront up and running. We can build you beautiful and responsive websites in no time.

Graphic Design

We don’t just make designs that look good. We make sure your customers trust and relate to your brand message.

Digital Marketing

Looking for more leads? We provide effective top-tier digital marketing services to all business types.

SEO

When people need something, they Google it! We can boost your rankings and increase your website’s visibility.

testimonials

Hear it from our clients

Get in Touch

Timmy Tewolde

Moonshine Commercial Cleaning
“We had a great experience working with Alpha Digital Solutions. They are very responsive and great at communicating with our needs. They are experts at what they do and I highly recommend them.”

Maria Alvarez

Conectate
“In looking for a trustworthy, reliable and professional company to help me with the graphics design and social media ads, I have been impressed with Alpha Digital Solutions! They are very professional, and reliable. I know I can count on them.”

Grey Morgan

Morgan Construction
“It was a pleasure working with the team at Alpha. I am really happy with the website they made for my company and their continued support even after the work was done. They did an excellent job!”

ACCELERATE YOUR ONLINE GROWTH

Ready to Transform Your Business?

Let’s Talk
FAQs
Need Help?
Read Popular Questions
If you have a question that hasn’t been answered below, please let us know on our contact us page.

How effective is digital marketing in Ethiopia?

Very effective! This is still an untapped market, and there are endless marketing options that could be a game-changer for your business. Prices are low, and there is little competition. Get in touch with us to discover more about the alternatives available for your business.

Do your marketing services require my involvement?

It will be up to you. If you are busy running your business, don’t worry; most of the work we conduct requires little to no engagement from you. However, if you want to participate in the advertising or design processes, we would be delighted to include you.

How do I decide which marketing service is best for my business?

Deciding which marketing service will bring your business the best results requires some knowledge about the marketing services. We recommend getting in touch with us so that we can learn more about your company. We can then assist you in choosing the ideal strategy.

How much do I need to spend on digital marketing services?

Your marketing budget will determine how much you spend. Of course, the more money you spend, the greater the results. But if you have a limited budget, there are less expensive options.

Do you provide web design services in Addis Ababa only?

Our website design services are available for all local and international businesses (regardless of your location). The only limitation we can imagine is language. If you are a business looking for web design in English or Amharic, you have come to the right place. But don’t worry, if the website you want to build uses another language, we can work with translation companies to make it happen.

What makes you different from other digital marketing companies in Ethiopia?

Here are some qualities we think set us apart from the competition:

Experience – We have been providing digital marketing services for a while, and some of our team members have over 10 years of experience in their area of expertise.

Attention to detail – In every step of our work, we strive to be thorough and precise. We believe the details make the most significant impact and that is where other companies fail to focus.

Customer-oriented service – We custom tailor our services to match your business so you can get lasting results. Alpha will work with you until you achieve your marketing goals.

Transparent services – All our services and reports are transparent. We will share with you all the losses and wins when we work with you. Our prices also reflect this attitude. There are no hidden fees or extra charges. At alpha we strongly believe honest communication is key to building long-term relationships with our clients.

Get Free Consultation

    Alpha is a digital marketing, graphic, and web design company based in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. Whether international or local, no matter your industry, we can work with you to achieve your marketing goals.
